mockupItems.prompt:
Create a premium Etsy-style Sticker Mockup using ONLY the uploaded clipart artwork.

The uploaded clipart must remain completely unchanged.

Do not redraw, repaint, restyle, simplify, alter colors, modify characters, add new illustrations, replace elements, or reinterpret the artwork.

Use the uploaded clipart exactly as provided as professionally produced sticker designs.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIMARY DESIGN PRINCIPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This task is NOT to showcase the clipart collection.

This task IS to create realistic Etsy-style sticker mockups that demonstrate how the artwork could be used as both physical stickers and digital stickers.

The stickers themselves are the product.

The final images should look like real Etsy bestseller listings.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMAGE FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Final image ratio: 4:3

Landscape orientation.

The stickers should occupy approximately 50–80% of the image.

The sticker designs must remain clearly visible at Etsy thumbnail size.

The images should be optimized for Etsy search results and mobile browsing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
THEME-FIRST STYLING RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Before designing the mockup, determine:

* Theme
* Subject Matter
* Intended Use
* Target Audience
* Lifestyle Context

The entire scene must be built around the artwork theme.

Do not build the scene around matching colors.

The theme always overrides the color palette.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND PRIORITY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The environment must be determined by:

1. Theme
2. Subject Matter
3. Intended Use
4. Target Audience
5. Color Palette

Never reverse this order.

Color palette should only be used as a supporting accent.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STICKER FORMAT VARIATION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

For each generated image, randomly choose one or more of the following:

PHYSICAL STICKERS

* die-cut stickers
* kiss-cut stickers
* sticker sheet
* vinyl stickers
* waterproof stickers
* planner stickers
* journal stickers
* laptop stickers
* water bottle stickers

DIGITAL STICKERS

* GoodNotes stickers
* digital planner stickers
* tablet sticker mockup
* digital sticker book
* digital journaling stickers
* iPad planner stickers

Mix physical and digital sticker concepts throughout the 10 generated images.

Each image should feel like a unique product presentation.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
ARTWORK USAGE RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Do not use all uploaded artwork.

Select only the most suitable artwork pieces.

Typical usage:

Minimal:
4–8 stickers

Standard:
8–15 stickers

Detailed:
15–25 stickers

Avoid sticker catalog layouts.

Avoid overwhelming compositions.

The stickers should feel intentionally curated.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND STORY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The environment should feel like a realistic place where the stickers would naturally be used.

The scene should communicate a lifestyle.

Examples:

Halloween Artwork
→ journaling desk
→ planner setup
→ seasonal crafting workspace

Mahjong Artwork
→ game-night accessories
→ laptop stickers
→ water bottle styling
→ social gathering setup

Ocean Artwork
→ travel journal
→ coastal workspace
→ summer planner styling

Farm Artwork
→ scrapbook desk
→ cozy autumn journaling setup

Back To School Artwork
→ notebooks
→ school supplies
→ student desk styling

The background should help buyers imagine using the stickers.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MOCKUP PERSONALITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The mockup should feel:

* premium
* playful
* creative
* cheerful
* stylish
* welcoming
* Pinterest-worthy
* Etsy bestseller quality

Think:

* creative workspace
* journaling community
* planner community
* sticker shop
* digital planning lifestyle

Avoid:

* corporate styling
* luxury fashion styling
* sterile product photography
* generic stock-photo environments

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
SCENE COMPOSITION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create realistic sticker presentations.

Possible compositions:

* sticker sheet display
* die-cut sticker collection
* planner spread
* journal spread
* laptop stickers
* water bottle stickers
* tablet mockup
* iPad planner setup
* digital journaling setup

Create depth and layering.

Allow realistic overlap.

The stickers should remain highly visible.

The stickers are always the hero.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
DIGITAL STICKER RULES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

When creating digital sticker mockups:

Display realistic tablet screens.

Show digital planners.

Show GoodNotes-style organization.

Use realistic handwriting and planner layouts.

Keep the artwork clearly visible.

Do not create generic tablet advertisements.

The digital stickers must remain the focus.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PHYSICAL STICKER RULES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

When creating physical sticker mockups:

Use realistic cut lines.

Show premium sticker materials.

Possible finishes:

* matte vinyl
* glossy vinyl
* waterproof laminate

Use realistic paper and vinyl textures.

Show professional print quality.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
LIGHTING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Natural daylight.

Soft window light.

Warm highlights.

Gentle shadows.

Bright inviting atmosphere.

Professional commercial product photography.

Avoid dramatic studio lighting.

Avoid dark editorial lighting.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
10 UNIQUE VARIATIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 completely different sticker mockups.

Each image should feel like a different professional photoshoot.

Randomly vary:

* physical or digital format
* sticker type
* product presentation
* background styling
* lifestyle setup
* props
* camera angle
* surface material
* lighting direction

All 10 images must feel genuinely different.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STRICTLY AVOID
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Using all artwork.

Clipart catalog appearance.

Sticker-sheet overload.

Tiny unreadable stickers.

Generic backgrounds.

Corporate styling.

Luxury fashion styling.

Backgrounds that overpower the stickers.

Tablet advertisements.

Packaging that hides the artwork.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 unique sticker mockup variations.

Deliver 10 separate images.

Final image ratio: 4:3

Landscape orientation.

Do not create a collage.

Do not create a grid.

Do not create a contact sheet.

Do not combine multiple mockups into one canvas.

Each image must look like a real Etsy bestseller sticker listing.

Photorealistic.

Pinterest-worthy.

Premium Etsy styling.

Creative lifestyle styling.

Professional commercial product photography.

Realistic sticker materials.

Theme-based background storytelling.

Inviting and slightly playful atmosphere.

mockupItems.prompt:
Create a premium Etsy-style invitation mockup using ONLY the uploaded clipart artwork.

The uploaded clipart must remain completely unchanged.

Do not redraw, repaint, restyle, simplify, alter colors, modify characters, add new illustrations, replace elements, or reinterpret the artwork.

Use the uploaded clipart exactly as provided as design elements within the invitation.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIMARY DESIGN PRINCIPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This task is NOT to showcase the clipart collection.

This task IS to create a realistic, professionally designed invitation that could be sold on Etsy.

The invitation itself is the product.

The invitation should look as though it was created by an experienced invitation designer for a real event.

Focus on invitation design first.

Focus on clipart display second.

The invitation should feel like something a customer would immediately purchase on Etsy.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
DESIGN PRIORITY ORDER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. Invitation Design Quality
2. Readability
3. Typography
4. Layout
5. Event Communication
6. Visual Balance
7. Subject Matter
8. Target Audience
9. Color Palette

Color palette has the lowest priority.

Never build the design primarily around artwork colors.

Always prioritize the meaning, purpose, and intended use of the artwork.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
EVENT INTERPRETATION RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Before designing the invitation, determine the most likely real-world event represented by the artwork.

Create an invitation specifically for that event.

Do not create generic invitation designs.

Do not create generic stationery.

Examples:

Mahjong Artwork
→ Mahjong Party
→ Game Night
→ Social Gathering

Halloween Artwork
→ Halloween Party

Ocean Artwork
→ Beach Party

Back To School Artwork
→ School Event

Dinosaur Artwork
→ Birthday Party

Farm Artwork
→ Fall Festival

The event should guide every design decision.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND PRIORITY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The environment must be determined by:

1. Event Type
2. Subject Matter
3. Intended Use
4. Target Audience
5. Color Palette

Never reverse this order.

Color palette should be used only as a supporting accent.

Never assume that pink artwork requires:

* bows
* flowers
* coquette styling
* princess themes
* feminine party styling

unless those themes are explicitly represented by the artwork.

Subject matter always overrides color palette.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
ARTWORK USAGE RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Do not use all uploaded artwork.

Do not create a clipart catalog.

Do not create a sticker-sheet appearance.

Do not attempt to showcase the entire collection.

Select only the artwork elements necessary to create a beautiful invitation.

Typical usage:

Minimal Invitation:
2–4 artwork elements

Standard Invitation:
4–8 artwork elements

Detailed Invitation:
8–12 artwork elements

Use restraint.

Use whitespace.

Allow typography to remain the focal point.

The invitation should feel curated and professionally designed.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
INVITATION PERSONALITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The invitation should feel:

* premium
* playful
* charming
* welcoming
* cheerful
* stylish
* modern
* celebration-focused

The invitation should NOT feel:

* corporate
* luxury hotel branding
* wedding-exclusive
* overly formal
* overly serious

Think:

* premium Etsy bestseller
* Pinterest-worthy celebration
* boutique party invitation
* professionally designed event invitation

A subtle amount of whimsy and personality is encouraged.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
LAYOUT STYLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Prioritize:

* modern layouts
* playful typography
* balanced compositions
* tasteful decorative accents
* strong hierarchy
* professional readability

Typography should be the visual anchor.

Artwork should support the typography.

Avoid filling every corner with artwork.

Whitespace is desirable.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
INVITATION FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create a vertical invitation card.

Final image ratio: 4:3.

Portrait invitation.

The invitation should occupy approximately 40–70% of the image.

The invitation must remain readable at Etsy thumbnail size.

The invitation is always the hero.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND MOOD
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The background should feel:

* premium
* playful
* cheerful
* welcoming
* stylish
* celebration-focused
* Pinterest-worthy
* Etsy bestseller quality

The environment should feel like a beautifully styled event or celebration.

Think:

* boutique party
* modern celebration
* event planner styling
* Pinterest party inspiration
* premium but fun atmosphere

Avoid:

* luxury hotel styling
* luxury wedding styling
* fashion editorial styling
* corporate styling
* overly formal styling

The background may include tasteful playful elements that support the event theme.

The overall feeling should be:

premium first,
fun second,
formal never.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND & EVENT STYLING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Build the environment around the event.

Do not build the environment around matching colors.

Examples:

Birthday Party
→ balloons
→ cake
→ celebration table
→ party details

Halloween Party
→ themed treats
→ seasonal decorations
→ garlands
→ playful celebration styling

Mahjong Party
→ drinks
→ snacks
→ game-night atmosphere
→ acrylic accessories
→ social gathering details

Beach Party
→ coastal textures
→ summer atmosphere
→ relaxed celebration styling

Back To School
→ classroom-inspired details
→ stationery accents
→ school celebration atmosphere

Props should support the story.

Props must never compete with the invitation.

The invitation must always remain the hero.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PAPER & PRINT QUALITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Premium cardstock.

Visible paper fibers.

Subtle paper grain.

Soft matte finish.

Realistic printing texture.

Authentic paper thickness.

Professional stationery quality.

Crisp typography.

High-quality print appearance.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
LIGHTING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Natural daylight.

Soft window light.

Gentle shadows.

Bright inviting atmosphere.

Warm approachable feel.

Professional product photography.

Avoid dramatic studio lighting.

Avoid dark editorial lighting.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
10 UNIQUE INVITATION DESIGNS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 completely different invitation designs.

Each invitation should feel as though it was created by a different designer.

Change:

* typography
* layout
* artwork selection
* artwork placement
* decorative framing
* event styling
* camera angle
* surface material
* product placement
* lighting direction

All 10 invitations must be genuinely different designs.

Not merely different photographs of the same invitation.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STRICTLY AVOID
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Using all artwork.

Clipart catalog appearance.

Sticker-sheet appearance.

Scrapbook appearance.

Crowded layouts.

Artwork around every edge.

Tiny unreadable text.

Excessive decoration.

Generic color-matched backgrounds.

Overly luxurious styling.

Backgrounds that overpower the invitation.

Formal wedding-only aesthetics.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Each variation must feature:

* a unique invitation design

* a unique mockup presentation

Deliver 10 separate images.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

* Theme

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The goal is to create beautiful, professionally designed postcards that customers would actually purchase.

Design quality takes priority over displaying as many clipart elements as possible.

Less is often more.

Use only the most suitable artwork elements.

Do not use every uploaded artwork element.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Examples include:

* elegant typography
* decorative borders
* vintage frames
* watercolor textures
* subtle paper patterns
* decorative lines
* banners
* ribbons
* stars
* sparkles
* dots

* decorative labels

* greetings
* event titles
* destination names
* celebration phrases
* holiday messages
* travel postcard headings
* short inspirational quotes

These additional design elements should enhance the postcard while keeping the uploaded artwork as the primary visual focus.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
VARIATION STYLE RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 unique postcard mockups.

• 5 images should feature beautifully designed postcards with decorative backgrounds, patterns, borders, or graphic layouts.

• 5 images should feature cleaner, minimal postcard designs with more white space and simpler layouts.

Both styles should feel like professionally designed stationery products sold on Etsy.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
POSTCARD STYLE RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The postcards should resemble products that could actually be sold in a boutique stationery shop.

Possible styles include:

* greeting cards
* illustrated postcards
* travel postcards
* souvenir postcards
* vintage-inspired postcards
* seasonal postcards
* holiday postcards
* event postcards
* collectible art postcards

Each postcard should feel professionally designed rather than simply placing clipart onto paper.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND STORY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The background is extremely important.

The environment should naturally match the artwork theme.

Examples:

Halloween Artwork
→ Halloween party table
→ pumpkins
→ candles
→ seasonal desserts

Mahjong Artwork
→ game-night table
→ cocktails
→ snacks
→ stylish party setup

Ocean Artwork
→ Mediterranean tabletop
→ lemons
→ shells
→ coastal decor

Farm Artwork
→ rustic harvest table
→ orchard styling
→ autumn decor

Back To School Artwork
→ creative stationery desk
→ notebooks
→ pencils
→ study setup

The environment should support the postcards without competing with them.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
DISPLAY STYLING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Display approximately 2–3 postcards.

Possible presentations:

* arranged naturally on a tabletop
* slightly overlapping
* displayed with matching envelopes
* leaning against small wooden stands
* styled on linen fabric
* displayed with subtle stationery accessories

Create depth and layering.

Allow realistic shadows.

The postcards should remain the hero.

Avoid floating postcards.

Avoid exaggerated perspective.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MOCKUP PERSONALITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The mockup should feel:

* premium
* playful
* stylish
* welcoming
* giftable
* Pinterest-worthy
* Etsy bestseller quality

Think:

* boutique stationery shop
* artisan paper goods
* premium greeting card collection
* lifestyle stationery photography

Avoid:

* luxury branding
* corporate styling
* sterile stock photography

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PAPER DETAILS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Use realistic premium cardstock.

Include:

* matte paper texture
* subtle paper grain
* realistic paper thickness
* crisp print quality
* clean edges

The postcards should look professionally manufactured.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
LIGHTING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Natural daylight.

Soft window light.

Warm highlights.

Gentle shadows.

Bright inviting atmosphere.

Professional commercial product photography.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STRICTLY NO PEOPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Do not include:

* people
* children
* adults
* faces
* hands
* arms
* bodies
* reflections of people

The postcards must be displayed without any human presence.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
10 UNIQUE VARIATIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Each image should feel like a different professional stationery product photoshoot.

* postcard sizes

All 10 images must feel genuinely different.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STRICTLY AVOID
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Using all artwork.

Clipart catalog appearance.

Oversized artwork.

Tiny unreadable artwork.

Floating postcard presentations.

Generic backgrounds.

Corporate styling.

Luxury branding.

Backgrounds that overpower the postcards.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Deliver 10 separate images.

Final image ratio: 4:3

Landscape orientation.

Display approximately 2–3 coordinated postcards in each image.

Use realistic retail stationery proportions.

Do not create a collage.

Do not create a contact sheet.

Each image must look like a real Etsy bestseller postcard listing.

Photorealistic.

Pinterest-worthy.

Premium Etsy styling.

Boutique stationery styling.

Professional commercial product photography.

Realistic paper textures.

Theme-based lifestyle storytelling.

Inviting and slightly playful atmosphere.

mockupItems.prompt:
Create a premium Etsy-style Wall Art mockup using ONLY the uploaded clipart artwork.

The uploaded clipart must remain completely unchanged.

Do not redraw, repaint, recolor, simplify, replace, or reinterpret the artwork.

Use the uploaded clipart exactly as provided as professionally printed framed wall art.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIMARY DESIGN
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create a realistic Etsy-style wall art mockup showing how the artwork would look displayed in a real home or lifestyle space.

The wall art is the product.

The goal is to make customers imagine displaying the artwork in their own space.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMAGE FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• Final ratio: 4:3 landscape

• Generate 10 separate images.

• Each image should feature 1–3 framed wall art pieces.

• The framed artwork should occupy about 40–70% of the image.

• The artwork must remain clearly visible at Etsy thumbnail size.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
ARTWORK SELECTION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Do not use all uploaded artwork.

Select only the most suitable artwork elements.

Each mockup should feature either:

• 1 large framed artwork

• 2 coordinated framed artworks

• 3 coordinated framed artworks

Distribute these naturally across the 10 images.

Each framed print should clearly feature one selected artwork element or one thoughtfully designed composition.

The selection should feel curated, intentional, and commercially viable.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
THEME-FIRST RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Always prioritize:

1. Subject matter
2. Theme
3. Intended use
4. Target audience
5. Color palette

Never build the room mainly around matching colors.

The artwork theme should guide the interior.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
LIFESTYLE INTERIOR RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Do not create a generic stylish room.

Create a lifestyle space for someone who would genuinely love and display this artwork.

The room should feel specifically connected to the artwork's:

* subject matter
* mood
* season
* intended audience
* lifestyle
* story

Examples:

Ocean artwork
→ a Mediterranean coastal home for someone who loves seaside living

Halloween artwork
→ a cozy home of someone who loves seasonal Halloween decorating

Farm artwork
→ a rustic cottage or farmhouse space for someone who loves harvest and orchard style

Dinosaur artwork
→ a playful children's room or playroom for a dinosaur-loving child

Mahjong artwork
→ a stylish game room, entertainment corner, or social lounge for someone who loves game nights

Back to School artwork
→ a playful learning space, reading nook, or creative study corner

The interior should feel authentic and emotionally connected to the artwork.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND & ROOM STYLING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Furniture, materials, props, textures, and décor should reinforce the artwork theme.

The background should support the wall art without overpowering it.

Possible display locations:

* wall mounted above furniture
* leaning on a shelf
* picture ledge styling
* console table styling
* mantel display
* bookshelf display
* nursery wall
* playroom wall
* game room wall
* seasonal shelf styling

Avoid empty blank walls with no context.

Avoid generic rooms that do not match the uploaded artwork.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FRAME STYLING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Use realistic, Etsy-friendly frames.

Possible frame styles:

* natural oak
* light maple
* white wood
* painted wood
* simple modern frame
* soft pastel frame when appropriate

Avoid ornate museum frames, gilded luxury frames, or overly formal gallery styling.

Frames should feel approachable, modern, and suitable for home décor.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MOCKUP PERSONALITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The mockup should feel:

* premium
* warm
* playful
* stylish
* welcoming
* curated
* Pinterest-worthy
* Etsy bestseller quality

Think boutique home décor, not luxury hotel interior.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
LIGHTING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Use natural window light with soft shadows.

Create realistic professional home décor photography.

The wall art should remain the hero.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
NO PEOPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Do not include people, children, babies, faces, hands, body parts, silhouettes, reflections of people, mannequins, or human figures.

The wall art must be displayed as a standalone home décor product.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
10 VARIATIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Vary:

* number of frames: 1, 2, or 3

All 10 images must feel genuinely different.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STRICTLY AVOID
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Using all uploaded artwork.

Clipart catalog appearance.

Tiny unreadable artwork.

Crowded interiors.

Generic rooms unrelated to the artwork.

Luxury hotel styling.

Corporate office styling.

Empty blank walls.

Frames that hide the artwork.

Backgrounds that overpower the wall art.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
OUTPUT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 unique wall art mockup variations.

Deliver 10 separate images.

Final ratio: 4:3 landscape.

Do not create a collage, grid, or contact sheet.

Do not combine multiple mockups into one canvas.

Each image must look like a real Etsy bestseller wall art listing.

Photorealistic.

Premium Etsy styling.

Curated lifestyle interior styling.

Theme-based home décor storytelling.

Realistic frame materials.

Warm, inviting, and slightly playful atmosphere.

No people.

mockupItems.prompt:
Create a premium Etsy-style Acrylic Keychain mockup using ONLY the uploaded clipart artwork.

The uploaded clipart must remain completely unchanged.

Do not redraw, repaint, restyle, simplify, alter colors, modify characters, add new illustrations, replace elements, or reinterpret the artwork.

Use the uploaded clipart exactly as provided as professionally manufactured acrylic keychain designs.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIMARY DESIGN PRINCIPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This task is NOT to showcase the clipart collection.

This task IS to create a realistic Etsy-style acrylic keychain mockup that demonstrates how the artwork could be sold as physical acrylic charms or keychains.

The acrylic keychains themselves are the product.

The final image should look like a real Etsy bestseller listing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMAGE FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Final image ratio: 4:3

Landscape orientation.

The keychains should occupy approximately 35–60% of the image.

The environment should remain visible.

The image should be optimized for Etsy search results and mobile browsing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
THEME-FIRST STYLING RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Before designing the mockup, determine:

* Theme
* Subject Matter
* Intended Use
* Target Audience
* Lifestyle Context

The entire scene must be built around the artwork theme.

Do not build the scene around matching colors.

The theme always overrides the color palette.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND PRIORITY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The environment must be determined by:

1. Theme
2. Subject Matter
3. Intended Use
4. Target Audience
5. Color Palette

Never reverse this order.

Color palette should only be used as a supporting accent.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
KEYCHAIN FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Transform the uploaded artwork into realistic acrylic keychains.

Possible formats:

* die-cut acrylic charms
* acrylic keychains
* clear acrylic charms
* epoxy acrylic charms
* double-sided acrylic charms
* holographic acrylic charms

Use approximately 4–12 keychains within the scene.

Select only the most suitable artwork elements.

Do not use every uploaded artwork element.

The collection should feel curated and commercially viable.

The keychains should appear realistic in size.

Individual keychains should typically measure approximately 2–3 inches (5–8 cm).

Avoid oversized keychains.

Avoid hero shots of a single giant keychain.

Prioritize realistic scale and collectible charm presentation.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
ACRYLIC MATERIAL RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The acrylic should look realistic.

Include:

* clear acrylic edges
* acrylic thickness
* glossy reflections
* realistic transparency
* polished surfaces
* subtle edge highlights

The keychains should look professionally manufactured.

Avoid flat paper-cutout appearances.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND STORY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

mockupItems.prompt:
Create premium Etsy-style stationery mockups using ONLY the uploaded clipart artwork.

The uploaded artwork must remain completely unchanged.

Do not redraw, repaint, recolor, simplify, replace, or reinterpret the artwork.

Use the artwork exactly as provided as professionally printed stationery designs.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIMARY DESIGN
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create realistic Etsy bestseller mockups showing how the artwork could be sold as a premium stationery collection.

The stationery products are the hero.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMAGE FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• Final ratio: 4:3 (landscape)

• Generate 10 separate images.

• Display approximately 3–6 coordinated stationery products per image.

• The stationery should occupy about 45–75% of the frame.

• The printed designs must remain easy to recognize at Etsy thumbnail size.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
THEME FIRST
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Build the entire scene around the uploaded artwork's:

* theme
* subject
* season
* target audience
* intended lifestyle

Always prioritize the artwork's theme over its colors.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STATIONERY DESIGN
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 unique stationery mockups.

Variation Types:

**5 mockups should feature Statement Designs.**

Each stationery product should have its own unique design while remaining part of the same coordinated collection.

Use approximately 1–5 carefully selected artwork elements for each product.

The artwork should occupy approximately 35–70% of each product.

Do not simply enlarge one clipart.

Instead, create a unique composition for every product.

For example:

* notebook → large hero composition
* journal → different hero composition
* bookmark → vertical layout
* pencil case → balanced composition
* pen → miniature icon arrangement
* pencil → small coordinated graphics
* sticky notes → simple layout with generous whitespace

Each product should feel individually designed.

The entire collection should feel cohesive.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**5 mockups should feature Coordinated Pattern Designs.**

Create boutique-quality repeating patterns using the uploaded artwork.

Every stationery product should feature a different version of the pattern.

Examples:

* notebook → medium repeat
* journal → large repeat
* pencil case → diagonal repeat
* bookmark → vertical repeat
* pen → tiny micro pattern
* pencil → miniature repeating icons
* sticky notes → sparse repeat
* memo pad → offset repeat

Vary naturally:

* artwork selection
* scale
* spacing
* rotation
* density
* layout

Avoid applying the exact same pattern to every product.

The collection should resemble a professionally designed stationery series.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STATIONERY PRODUCTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Display a coordinated stationery gift collection.

Possible products include:

* small spiral notebook
* hardcover journal
* memo pad
* sticky notes
* bookmark
* pencil case
* pen
* pencil
* clipboard
* desk pad
* folder
* planner cover
* washi tape

Display approximately 3–6 products in each image.

Create the impression of a premium matching stationery collection.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
DISPLAY STYLING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Arrange the stationery naturally on a tabletop or desk.

Possible presentations:

* creative workspace
* boutique stationery display
* flat lay
* study desk
* gift set presentation
* neatly styled desktop

Create natural overlap and depth.

The stationery should always remain the hero.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create an environment that naturally matches the artwork theme.

Examples:

Halloween
→ cozy autumn desk

Mahjong
→ stylish game-night stationery

Ocean
→ Mediterranean workspace

Farm
→ rustic cottage desk

Back To School
→ modern study desk

Baby
→ soft nursery workspace

The background should support the stationery without becoming the focal point.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
LIGHTING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Use natural window light with soft shadows.

Highlight the paper texture, notebook covers, pen finishes and printed details.

Create realistic commercial stationery photography.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
NO PEOPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Do not include:

* people
* children
* babies
* hands
* body parts
* models
* mannequins
* silhouettes
* reflections of people

Always present the stationery as standalone products.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
10 VARIATIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 completely different mockups.

Within each stationery collection, every product should have its own unique artwork arrangement.

No two products should share the exact same composition or repeating pattern.

Vary:

* stationery products
* statement vs pattern designs
* product combinations
* artwork layouts
* artwork scale
* pattern density
* tabletop materials
* props
* camera angle
* lighting
* background styling

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
OUTPUT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 separate stationery mockups.

• 5 images should feature coordinated Statement Designs.

• 5 images should feature coordinated Pattern Designs.

Each product within the same image should have its own custom design while clearly belonging to the same stationery collection.

Do not create a collage.

Do not create a grid.

Do not create a contact sheet.

Do not combine multiple mockups into one canvas.

Each image must look like a real Etsy bestseller stationery listing.

Photorealistic.

Premium boutique stationery styling.

Pinterest-worthy.

Professional commercial product photography.

Realistic paper and fabric textures.

Theme-based lifestyle storytelling.

Slightly playful.

No people.

* rotation
* layering

* scrapbook workspace
* journal page
* cutting mat
* clipboard
* sketchbook
* art board

mockupItems.prompt:
Create a premium Etsy-style Mug mockup using ONLY the uploaded clipart artwork.

The uploaded clipart must remain completely unchanged.

Do not redraw, repaint, restyle, simplify, alter colors, modify characters, add new illustrations, replace elements, or reinterpret the artwork.

Use the uploaded clipart exactly as provided as professionally printed mug designs.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIMARY DESIGN PRINCIPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This task is NOT to showcase the clipart collection.

This task IS to create a realistic Etsy-style mug mockup that demonstrates how the artwork could be used on drinkware.

The mugs themselves are the product.

The final image should look like a real Etsy bestseller listing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMAGE FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Final image ratio: 4:3

Landscape orientation.

Display approximately 2 coordinated mugs in each mockup.

The mugs should occupy approximately 40–70% of the image.

The environment should remain visible.

The mug designs must remain clearly visible at Etsy thumbnail size.

The image should be optimized for Etsy search results and mobile browsing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
THEME-FIRST STYLING RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Before designing the mockup, determine:

* Theme
* Subject Matter
* Intended Use
* Target Audience
* Lifestyle Context

The entire scene must be built around the artwork theme.

Do not build the scene around matching colors.

The theme always overrides the color palette.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND PRIORITY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The environment must be determined by:

1. Theme
2. Subject Matter
3. Intended Use
4. Target Audience
5. Color Palette

Never reverse this order.

Color palette should only be used as a supporting accent.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MUG DESIGN RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Use only the most suitable artwork elements.

Do not use every uploaded artwork element.

Select approximately:

* 1–3 hero elements
  or
* 3–8 coordinated elements

The artwork should occupy approximately 15–35% of the visible mug surface.

Maintain generous negative space.

Avoid full-wrap overcrowded designs.

Avoid covering the entire mug.

Avoid oversized graphics.

In addition to the printed artwork, the mug itself may incorporate subtle design accents inspired by the uploaded artwork theme.

Examples include:

* decorative colored rims
* matching handle colors
* colored interiors
* embossed patterns
* subtle repeating motifs
* complementary ceramic textures
* coordinating ceramic finishes
* small accent motifs
* delicate ceramic detailing

These decorative mug details should enhance the overall product while keeping the uploaded clipart as the main focal point.

The mug should feel professionally designed, cohesive, and commercially viable.

Think:

* Etsy bestseller mug
* boutique ceramic collection
* artisan pottery
* collectible gift mug
* premium home decor drinkware

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MUG FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 unique mug mockups.

Variation Types:

5 mockups should feature classic premium ceramic mugs with timeless, clean silhouettes.

5 mockups should feature decorative boutique mug styles inspired by artisan ceramics and trendy Etsy drinkware.

Possible classic mug styles:

* classic ceramic mug
* glossy white mug
* matte ceramic mug
* stoneware mug
* premium coffee mug
* giftable themed mug

Possible decorative boutique mug styles:

* scalloped rim mug
* wavy silhouette mug
* softly fluted mug
* rounded bubble mug
* pedestal mug
* embossed ceramic mug
* beaded handle mug
* heart-shaped handle mug
* ribbon-inspired handle mug
* vintage cafe mug
* colored rim mug
* speckled pottery mug
* handmade ceramic mug

The mug shape should complement the artwork theme.

The decorative mug styles should remain realistic, elegant, and commercially viable.

Avoid novelty mugs.

Avoid unrealistic fantasy mug shapes.

Avoid cartoonish mug shapes.

The mugs should feel like premium boutique drinkware sold on Etsy.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
COORDINATED MUG SET RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Display approximately 2 coordinated mugs in each image.

The two mugs may feature:

* matching designs
* complementary artwork
* coordinated collection designs
* different artwork selections from the same uploaded collection
* similar ceramic finishes with different printed motifs

The two mugs should feel like they belong to the same product line.

They should look intentionally paired, not randomly placed together.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND STORY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The background is extremely important.

The environment should represent the lifestyle associated with the artwork.

Examples:

Halloween Artwork
→ cozy autumn coffee setup
→ seasonal treats
→ Halloween decor

Mahjong Artwork
→ game-night table
→ cocktails
→ snacks
→ social gathering atmosphere

Ocean Artwork
→ coastal breakfast setup
→ Mediterranean styling
→ seaside lifestyle

Farm Artwork
→ orchard-inspired kitchen styling
→ cozy fall atmosphere

Back To School Artwork
→ study desk
→ notebooks
→ stationery styling

The environment should support the mugs without overpowering them.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
DISPLAY STYLING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Possible presentations:

* mugs on a styled table
* coffee station setup
* breakfast table styling
* gift presentation
* shelf display
* kitchen counter styling
* cozy tabletop scene
* boutique gift-shop display

Create depth and layering.

Allow natural overlap.

The mugs must remain highly visible.

The mugs are always the hero.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MOCKUP PERSONALITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The mockup should feel:

* premium
* playful
* cozy
* giftable
* stylish
* welcoming
* Pinterest-worthy
* Etsy bestseller quality

Think:

* boutique gift shop
* artisan coffee corner
* cozy home decor
* collectible drinkware
* curated ceramic collection

Avoid:

* luxury hotel styling
* corporate office styling

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The background is extremely important.

The scene should feel like a real event where this garland would naturally be displayed.

The environment should immediately communicate the theme.

Examples:

Halloween Artwork
→ Halloween dessert table
→ seasonal mantle display
→ autumn party styling

Mahjong Artwork
→ game-night party setup
→ cocktail station
→ social gathering space

Ocean Artwork
→ Mediterranean celebration
→ lemon-themed party
→ coastal event styling

Farm Artwork
→ harvest festival
→ fall celebration
→ orchard-inspired setup

Circus Artwork
→ carnival styling
→ whimsical party display

Back To School Artwork
→ classroom celebration
→ school event styling

The environment should tell a story.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
ENVIRONMENT DESIGN RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The garland should feel integrated into the environment.

Possible placements:

* dessert table backdrop
* party table backdrop
* shelf display
* mantle styling
* nursery wall
* playroom decor
* celebration wall
* welcome table

Avoid empty blank walls.

Avoid floating garlands without context.

The setting should feel intentional and realistic.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MOCKUP PERSONALITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The mockup should feel:

* premium
* playful
* cheerful
* welcoming
* stylish
* celebration-focused
* Pinterest-worthy
* Etsy bestseller quality

Think:

* boutique party decor
* Pinterest celebration styling
* event planner setup
* professionally styled party

Avoid:

* corporate styling
* luxury hotel styling
* sterile product photography
* empty showroom environments

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MATERIALS & DETAILS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Use realistic materials.

Possible elements:

* twine
* ribbon
* mini clothespins
* wood beads
* tassels
* paper cutouts
* layered cardstock

Show realistic paper texture.

Show realistic printing quality.

Show dimensionality and depth.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
LIGHTING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Natural daylight.

Soft window light.

Warm highlights.

Gentle shadows.

Bright inviting atmosphere.

Professional commercial product photography.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
10 UNIQUE VARIATIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 completely different garland or banner mockups.

Each image should feel like a different professional party stylist designed it.

Vary:

* garland style
* hanging method
* artwork selection
* artwork order
* environment
* props
* event setup
* camera angle
* lighting direction

All 10 images must feel genuinely different.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STRICTLY AVOID
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Clipart catalog appearance.

Sticker-sheet appearance.

Blank walls with no context.

Tiny unreadable artwork.

Generic party rooms.

Corporate styling.

Luxury hotel styling.

Backgrounds that overpower the garland.

Crowded compositions.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Generate 10 unique garland or banner mockup variations.

Deliver 10 separate images.

Final image ratio: 4:3

Landscape orientation.

Do not create a collage.

Do not create a grid.

Do not create a contact sheet.

Do not combine multiple mockups into one canvas.

Each image must look like a real Etsy bestseller party decoration listing.

Photorealistic.

Pinterest-worthy.

Premium Etsy styling.

Party-focused storytelling.

Professional commercial product photography.

Realistic materials and textures.

Theme-based event environments.

Inviting and slightly playful atmosphere.

mockupItems.prompt:
Create a premium Etsy-style Gift Wrapping mockup using ONLY the uploaded clipart artwork.

The uploaded clipart must remain completely unchanged.

Do not redraw, repaint, restyle, simplify, alter colors, modify characters, add new illustrations, replace elements, or reinterpret the artwork.

Use the uploaded clipart exactly as provided as professionally printed gift wrap and gift packaging designs.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIMARY DESIGN PRINCIPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This task is NOT to showcase the clipart collection.

This task IS to create a realistic Etsy-style gift wrapping mockup that demonstrates how the artwork could be be used as wrapping paper and gift packaging.

The wrapping design itself is the product.

The final image should look like a real Etsy bestseller listing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMAGE FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Final image ratio: 4:3

Landscape orientation.

The gift wrapping products should occupy approximately 50–80% of the image.

The wrapping paper design must remain clearly visible at Etsy thumbnail size.

The packaging products should be immediately recognizable.

The image should be optimized for Etsy search results and mobile browsing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
THEME-FIRST STYLING RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Before designing the mockup, determine:

* Theme
* Subject Matter
* Intended Occasion
* Target Audience
* Gift-Giving Context

The entire scene must be built around the occasion represented by the artwork.

Do not build the scene around matching colors.

Do not build the scene around generic gift photography.

The occasion always overrides the color palette.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND PRIORITY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The scene must be determined by:

1. Occasion
2. Theme
3. Subject Matter
4. Target Audience
5. Color Palette

Never reverse this order.

Color palette should only be used as a supporting accent.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
GIFT WRAP FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create a professionally styled gift wrapping presentation.

Use the uploaded artwork to create realistic repeating surface pattern designs.

Possible applications include:

* wrapping paper
* gift wrap
* gift box
* envelope
* gift tag
* sticker seal
* tissue paper
* folded wrapping sheets

Use 2–6 coordinated packaging items.

The collection should feel cohesive and professionally designed.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PATTERN DESIGN RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create realistic repeating pattern designs.

The artwork should appear naturally repeated across the packaging.

Allow breathing room between repeated elements.

Do not overcrowd the pattern.

Do not use every uploaded artwork element.

Select only the most appropriate elements.

Avoid sticker-sheet layouts.

Avoid clipart catalog layouts.

The pattern should feel professionally designed for retail gift wrap.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND STORY RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The background is extremely important.

The background should feel like a real environment where this gift would naturally be given, received, displayed, or exchanged.

The environment should immediately communicate the occasion represented by the artwork.

The background should feel intentionally curated around the theme.

Do not create generic wrapping paper photography.

Do not create generic stationery photography.

Do not create generic gift shop scenes.

Create an environment that feels connected to the artwork theme and gifting occasion.

The background should help buyers imagine using the product.

mockupItems.prompt:
Create a premium Etsy-style Party Paper Suite mockup using ONLY the uploaded clipart artwork.

The uploaded clipart must remain completely unchanged.

Do not redraw, repaint, restyle, simplify, alter colors, modify characters, add new illustrations, replace elements, or reinterpret the artwork.

Use the uploaded clipart exactly as provided as professionally printed artwork across multiple coordinated party paper products.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIMARY DESIGN PRINCIPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This task is NOT to showcase the clipart collection.

This task IS to create a realistic Etsy-style party paper suite that looks professionally designed for a real event.

The paper products themselves are the product.

Not the clipart collection.

The final image should look like a premium Etsy bestseller listing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRODUCT SUITE FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create a coordinated party paper collection using multiple paper items.

Possible products include:

* Invitation
* Menu Card
* Place Card
* Welcome Sign
* Favor Tag
* Gift Tag
* Straw Marker
* Cup Wrap
* Paper Cup
* Food Label
* Party Signage
* Table Card

Use 4–10 coordinated products within the scene.

The products should feel like a matching event collection.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
DESIGN PRIORITY ORDER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. Product Visibility
2. Product Design Quality
3. Readability
4. Layout
5. Event Communication
6. Visual Balance
7. Subject Matter
8. Target Audience
9. Color Palette

Color palette has the lowest priority.

Always prioritize the event and subject matter.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
EVENT INTERPRETATION RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Determine the most likely event represented by the artwork.

Examples:

Mahjong Artwork
→ Mahjong Party
→ Game Night
→ Social Gathering

Halloween Artwork
→ Halloween Party

Ocean Artwork
→ Coastal Party
→ Summer Celebration

Back To School Artwork
→ School Event

Farm Artwork
→ Harvest Party

Design the entire paper suite around that event.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
ARTWORK USAGE RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Do not use all uploaded artwork.

Do not create a clipart catalog.

Do not create a sticker-sheet appearance.

Select only the most appropriate artwork pieces.

Each paper product should use different artwork combinations.

The collection should feel intentionally designed.

Use restraint.

Use whitespace.

Prioritize good design over artwork quantity.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PARTY SUITE PERSONALITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The collection should feel:

* premium
* playful
* cheerful
* welcoming
* stylish
* celebration-focused
* professionally designed

Think:

* Etsy bestseller
* Pinterest party inspiration
* boutique event styling
* premium but fun

Avoid:

* luxury hotel branding
* wedding-only styling
* corporate design
* overly formal design

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
SCENE COMPOSITION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create a realistic party table scene.

The products should be arranged naturally.

Layer items slightly.

Create depth.

Create visual hierarchy.

Allow some products to overlap naturally.

The composition should feel professionally styled by an event planner.

The paper products should occupy approximately 50–80% of the image.

The products are the hero.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BACKGROUND MOOD
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The background should feel:

* premium
* playful
* warm
* inviting
* Pinterest-worthy
* celebration-focused

The environment should feel like a beautifully styled party.

Avoid:

* luxury hotel styling
* fashion editorial styling
* sterile product photography

Think:

* boutique party
* premium celebration
* modern gathering
* stylish event setup

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
EVENT STYLING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Examples:

Birthday Party
→ cake
→ balloons
→ party table

Halloween Party
→ treats

→ garlands

Mahjong Party
→ drinks
→ snacks
→ game-night atmosphere

Beach Party
→ lemons
→ shells
→ coastal textures

→ stationery
→ classroom-inspired details

Props should support the story.

Props must never overpower the paper products.

mockupItems.japaneseTranslation:
Create a premium Etsy-style Party Paper Suite mockup using ONLY the uploaded clipart artwork.

The uploaded clipart must remain completely unchanged.

Do not redraw, repaint, restyle, simplify, alter colors, modify characters, add new illustrations, replace elements, or reinterpret the artwork.

Use the uploaded clipart exactly as provided as professionally printed artwork across multiple coordinated party paper products.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRIMARY DESIGN PRINCIPLE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This task is NOT to showcase the clipart collection.

This task IS to create a realistic Etsy-style party paper suite that looks professionally designed for a real event.

The paper products themselves are the product.

Not the clipart collection.

The final image should look like a premium Etsy bestseller listing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PRODUCT SUITE FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Create a coordinated party paper collection using multiple paper items.

Possible products include:

* Invitation
* Menu Card
* Place Card
* Welcome Sign
* Favor Tag
* Gift Tag
* Straw Marker
* Cup Wrap
* Paper Cup
* Food Label
* Party Signage
* Table Card

Use 4–10 coordinated products within the scene.

The products should feel like a matching event collection.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
DESIGN PRIORITY ORDER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. Product Visibility
2. Product Design Quality
3. Readability
4. Layout
5. Event Communication
6. Visual Balance
7. Subject Matter
8. Target Audience
9. Color Palette

Color palette has the lowest priority.

Always prioritize the event and subject matter.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
EVENT INTERPRETATION RULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Determine the most likely event represented by the artwork.

Examples:

Mahjong Artwork
→ Mahjong Party
→ Game Night
→ Social Gathering

Halloween Artwork
→ Halloween Party

Ocean Artwork
→ Coastal Party
→ Summer Celebration

Back To School Artwork
→ School Event

Farm Artwork
→ Harvest Party

Design the entire paper suite around that event.

promptCards.title: かわいい動物ステッカー
promptCards.category: ステッカーモックアップ
promptCards.description: 白背景でステッカーの質感が見えやすい、Etsy向けの定番モックアップ。
promptCards.prompt: 温かみのある白い紙の上に置いた、清潔感のあるステッカーシートの平置きモックアップ。自然光、やわらかな影、上品なハンドメイド文具の雰囲気、透過PNGアートを配置しやすい余白。
promptCards.note: 動物クリップアートのステッカー販売ページ用。

promptCards.title: 植物アートプリント
promptCards.category: アートプリントモックアップ
promptCards.description: アートプリントをリビングの壁に飾った販売ページ向け写真。
promptCards.prompt: 落ち着いたリビングの壁に飾った額入りアートプリントのモックアップ。オーク材の額縁、ニュートラルなソファ、やわらかな日差し、北欧風インテリア、リアルなファインアート紙。
promptCards.note: 水彩植物シリーズ用。額縁は明るめ。

videoPromptCards.title: 淡いステッカー紹介動画
videoPromptCards.prompt: soft pastel clipart sticker sheet reveal, gentle camera push in, cozy stationery desk, clean white background, smooth motion
videoPromptCards.memo: Etsyのサムネイル動画やSNS用に使いやすい構成。

videoPromptCards.title: 招待状モックアップ動画
videoPromptCards.prompt: wedding invitation card mockup on linen fabric, slow top-down camera movement, elegant natural light, warm ivory tone
videoPromptCards.memo: 招待状パックの販売ページ用。
